ogTitle: Dargal Road vs Darling Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dargal Road and Darling Heights.
heading: Dargal Road vs Darling Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dargal Road, Queensland and Darling Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dargal Road has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Darling Heights (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dargal Road or Darling Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dargal Road has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Darling Heights scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dargal Road scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Darling Heights scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dargal Road or Darling Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dargal Road has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
